title: Simply Boba
description: A simple, vanilla-friendly mod that simply adds different Boba Tea variants into Minecraft.
body:
_Simply Boba_ is a small mod that simply adds several different types of Boba Tea into Minecraft. Each variant has a high nutritional and saturation level, though they aren't the easiest item to craft early-game.



Features:

1.0.0

- Tapioca Pearls: Can be obtained from smelting Honeycomb. Serves as the base for any good Boba drink! Can also be eaten by itself.
- Milk Coffee Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will also clear any effects and behaves in a similar way to milk.
- Matcha Milk Tea Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Jump Boost to the player for 30 seconds.
- Pumpkin Spice Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Haste to the player for 30 seconds.
- Watermelon Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Regeneration to the player for 30 seconds.
- Honey Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Slow Falling to the player for 30 seconds.
- Chorus Fruit Boba: Has a nutritional value of 14 and saturation of 10. Will teleport the player to a random location (similar to a chorus fruit) upon consumption.

2.0.0

- Tapioca Pearl Block: Can be crafted using 9 Tapioca Pearls and uncrafted (similar to ore blocks). This makes it much easier and convenient to store Tapioca Pearls.
- Sweet Berry Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Resistance to the player for 15 seconds.
- Glow Berry Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant the Glowing effect to the player for 5 seconds and Night Vision for 15 seconds.
- Golden Apple Boba: Has a nutritional value of 14 and saturation of 10. Will grant Absorption to the player for 15 seconds and Regeneration for 10 seconds.
The duration of the effects from Simply Boba 1.0.0 have also been reduced to 15 seconds.

3.0.0

- Paper Straw: Can be crafted using 2 paper in the same position as a stick and will give 4 straws. Used to craft Paper Straw Boba Tea variants.
- Bamboo Straw: Can be crafted using a single piece of bamboo and will give a single straw. Used to craft Bamboo Straw Boba Tea variants.

4.0.0

- 15 Paper Straw Colored Variants: Can be crafted by crafting ANY Paper Straw (could be regular or any one of the variants) with the dye color of your choice. Colors include:
  - Light Gray
  - Gray
  - Black
  - Brown
  - Red
  - Orange
  - Yellow
  - Lime
  - Green
  - Cyan
  - Light Blue
  - Blue
  - Purple
  - Magenta
  - Pink

- Along with these new color straw variants, there are also 135 NEW Boba Tea variants using these straws (9 existing Boba Tea flavours * 15 colored straw variants). To craft these, simply replace the straw in the crafting recipe with the colored straw you desire.
  
Legacy Version

- Tapioca Pearls: Can be obtained from smelting Honeycomb. Serves as the base for any good Boba drink! Can also be eaten by itself.
- Milk Coffee Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will also clear any effects and behaves in a similar way to milk.
- Matcha Milk Tea Boba: Has a nutritional value of 12 and saturation of 10. Will grant Jump Boost to the player for 3 seconds.

MOD PACKS:

You may use this mod in a mod pack, however, we would appreciate being credited.

IF YOU SEE THIS MOD ANYWHERE BUT MODRINTH OR CURSEFORGE, IT IS NOT MINE!

[Curseforge Mod Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-boba)
